name: part_004
file: tmp_【チラ見せ】hololive 3rd Generation Live#きゅるるん大作戦〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜【DAY2】 [XJJXk28ivwY]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_004.webm

scenes.description: A fast-paced montage of handwritten messages from fans expressing their support and excitement for the Hololive 3rd Generation Live.
An "Attention" slide provides instructions and warnings for the concert attendees.
Showcase of the second release of concert merchandise, including support sets, towels, and acrylic panels.
Transition to the darkened live concert venue filled with an audience holding penlights, as an opening announcement begins.

subtitles.original: きゅるるん大作戦〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜
subtitles.english: Operation Kyururun: The Ultimate Idols—You Have No Choice But to Support Them!

subtitles.original: 演出の都合上、照明の点滅にご注意ください
subtitles.english: Please be aware of flashing lights during the performance.
